name: Compliance App v1
description: Statutory compliance management — clients, registrations, laws, rules, filings with workflow-driven lifecycle, generator cadence, and lifecycle cascades.

tasks.title: Stream A — Tasks package hardening
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Workflow states, action perms, pickup/reassign endpoints, my-tasks scope, team required.

tasks.title: Stream C — Role/position/scope seeds
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Compliance roles + role-tier UI advisory seeded.

tasks.title: Stream B — Overdue escalation
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: T+0/T+3/T+7 schedule_once rules with three org-unit resolvers + four email templates. Three emails max per task.

tasks.title: Stream D — Daily task digest
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Digest fires at 9am APP_TIMEZONE.

tasks.title: Stream E — Audit trail wiring
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Auditable events registered for all compliance entities with before/after snapshots.

tasks.title: Stream F — Filing attachments
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: hasAttachments + attachmentConfig declarative wiring; 8 MIME types, 25MB cap, soft-delete.
tasks.notes: PR #995. Scope: filings only (no compliance tasks in V1).

tasks.title: Stream G — Comments + @mention notifications
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: hasNotes on filings + new mention detection + in-app notifications via NoteMentioned event.
tasks.notes: PR #996. Email mentions deferred.

tasks.title: Stream H — Employee lifecycle
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: User deactivation nulls assignee on open tasks; deletes org-unit memberships; resolvers filtered by deletedAt.
tasks.notes: PR #997. Zero compliance-domain code — all in users/tasks/org-units packages.

tasks.title: Stream I1-I10 — Lifecycle cascades
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Client dormancy + registration deactivation + rule deprecation cascade to filing cancellations with workflow history.
tasks.notes: PRs #999, #1002, #1003. Introduced GuardResult contract + /workflows/preflight + onTransition hook.

tasks.title: Stream I13-I16 — Rule edit guards
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Block destructive rule edits once filings exist; forward-only copy on due-date-math edits.
tasks.notes: PR #1009. Identity-field immutability guard + per-field tooltips + forward-only confirm dialog.

tasks.title: Block code/frequency/lawId edits once filings exist
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Server-side guard returns 422 with explanation; UI disables fields with tooltip.
tasks.notes: ImmutableRuleFieldError wired as beforeUpdate hook on COMPLIANCE_RULES_CONFIG.

tasks.title: Forward-only copy on due-date-math edits
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Editing dueDateOffset/calendar creates a new rule version; existing filings keep old math.
tasks.notes: Forward-only confirm dialog intercepts save when due-date math changed. Existing filings keep original dueDate (verified in T-010-3).

tasks.title: Generator no-op on conflict test
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Test asserts generator skips already-materialised periods even when rule version changes.
tasks.notes: No create/update/delete/event when re-running generator against drifted rule.

tasks.title: Stream I19-I23 — Handler integrity guards
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Prevent registration/law_handler changes that would orphan filings; surface 'Configure handler' prompts.
tasks.notes: PR #1064 (I19/I20/I21/I23) + PR #1071 (I22) on top of org-units-as-library reshape #1070.

tasks.title: canResolveAssignee helper (renamed from hasResolvableHandler)
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Reusable check: client + law has at least one resolvable assignee path.
tasks.notes: Boolean twin of resolveAssignee on ComplianceRulesService; shared private findResolvedHandler returns discriminated kind. excludeHandlerId param supports I21.

tasks.title: Guard on registration-create
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Block creating registration without resolvable handler unless admin overrides.
tasks.notes: NoResolvableAssigneeError (400 NO_RESOLVABLE_ASSIGNEE). Wired across create() / register() / registerMany().

tasks.title: Guard on law_handlers delete
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Block deleting last handler if active registrations depend on it.
tasks.notes: LawHandlerRequiredError (400 LAW_HANDLER_REQUIRED). assertHandlerCanBeDeleted walks active registrations excluding the row.

tasks.title: Guard on org_units delete
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Block deleting org unit referenced by active law_handlers.
tasks.notes: PR #1071 (I22 subclass on top of #1070 org-units-as-library reshape). ComplianceOrgUnitService overrides assertCanDelete() to count law_handlers referencing the unit; throws BadRequestException with code HANDLERS_REFERENCE_UNIT when > 0.

tasks.title: Inline 'Configure handler' prompts
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Empty-state CTAs on client laws tab + law detail when no handler is configured.
tasks.notes: NewClientDrawer surfaces I20 rejection inline above law-selection; isNoResolvableAssigneeError + NO_RESOLVABLE_ASSIGNEE constant exported from useClientsApi for reuse.

tasks.title: Stream I24-I25 — Inactive-state UI
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Banners on client/registration/rule detail pages reflect dormant/deactivated/deprecated state. Subtle marker on task rows whose source is inactive.
tasks.notes: PR #1067. Reusable InactiveStateBanner + InactiveSourceMarker primitives in domains/compliance/ui/components/badges/.

tasks.title: Inactive-state banners on detail pages
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Client/registration/rule detail pages show banner when entity is dormant/deactivated/deprecated.
tasks.notes: Wired on ClientDetailPage (status=dormant) and RuleEditPage (status=deprecated). Registrations don't have a standalone detail page in V1 — covered by T-016-2's row marker.

tasks.title: Inactive-source marker on filing/registration rows
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Subtle marker on filing rows / drawer / Laws-tab rows whose source client/registration/rule is inactive.
tasks.notes: Filing type extended with optional clientStatus/ruleStatus/registrationDeactivatedAt. Laws tab hides Deactivate action on already-deactivated registrations.

tasks.title: Stream J — Generator cadence
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Filings auto-materialise 12 months ahead, daily cron + event-triggered top-ups.
tasks.notes: PR #1068. ComplianceFilingsGeneratorService extracts iteration; listener subscribes to rule.Status/Created, registration.Created, client.StatusChanged for J3-J5; daily cron via system seed.

tasks.title: 12-month horizon
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Generator produces filings up to 12 months ahead per active registration.
tasks.notes: HORIZON_MONTHS bumped from 6 to 12 in both action and demo seed.

tasks.title: Daily cron
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Cron fires daily at low-traffic hour (cronForLocalHour); idempotent across runs.
tasks.notes: System-seeded automation rule: schedule_recurring on compliance-rules @ 2am APP_TIMEZONE with status=active condition.

tasks.title: Event-triggered top-ups
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Generator runs on rule activation, registration creation, and client reactivation to backfill missing periods immediately.
tasks.notes: ComplianceFilingsGeneratorListener routes 4 events: compliance-rules.Created/StatusChanged (J3), client-registrations.Created (J4), clients.StatusChanged (J5). Idempotency keeps overlap with cron safe.

tasks.title: Stream Z — Finalisation audit
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Cross-stream audit: naming consistency, domain boundaries, type safety, test coverage, doc drift.

tasks.title: E2E test infrastructure
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Playwright UI E2E suite at e2e-compliance/ — 13 specs / 48 tests against real backend.
tasks.notes: PRs #1055 (infra), #1058 (CRUD), #1059 (cross-entity + RBAC), #1060 (bug log).

tasks.title: Stream K — Backend bug fixes from E2E
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: K1 ISO date coerce on registrations; K2 ISO + empty-string preprocess on filings; K3 workflow seed upsert; K4 user invite docs.
tasks.notes: PR #1061. Surfaced by the new E2E suite.
